case_title: KARINA RAMIREZ VS. AUGUST SUN ENTERPRISES, INC.,

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF RAMIREZ, KARINA AS TO DEFENDANT AUGUST SUN ENTERPRISES, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RAMIREZ, KARINA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AUGUST SUN ENTERPRISES, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION $9,930.41 PRINCIPAL, $48.98 INTEREST, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,204.39, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
